description: Shows ASP.NET metrics from OpenTelemetry NuGet

targets.expr: (sum(rate(http_client_request_duration_seconds_count{job="$job", instance="$instance", server_address!="otel-collector", error_type=~".+"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) / (sum(rate(http_client_request_duration_seconds_count{job="$job", instance="$instance", server_address!="otel-collector"}[$__rate_interval])))

title: ASP.NET OTEL Metrics
